channel.title: SPL - Green Lake Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Green Lake Branch

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Green Lake Branch

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details

item.title: Spring Break: Game On! Board games & Nintendo Switch
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Green Lake Branch, Meeting Room

Calling all board gamers. Join us and play a game or two.

Event details

item.title: Spring Break: Pies and Puzzles
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Green Lake Branch, Meeting Room

Relax with a puzzle and slice of pie!

Event details

item.title: Medicare Made Clear
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Green Lake Branch

Everything you need to know about Medicare!

Event details

item.title: Spring Break: Arts & Crafts
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Green Lake Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for an afternoon of connection by making art together.

Event details

item.title: Spring Break: Lego
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Green Lake Branch, Meeting Room

We'll bring the building supplies. You bring your imagination!

Event details

item.title: Toddler Play Group
item.description:
Monday, April 20, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Green Lake Branch, Meeting Room

A drop-in play group for toddlers and their families.

Event details

item.title: FamilyWorks Mobile Food Bank
item.description:
Tuesday, April 21, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Green Lake Branch

Come by the Mobile Pantry to receive free nutritious food!
